# Sai Nandu Vajhala

> AI & Machine Learning Engineer from Hyderabad, India.

## Summary
Sai Nandu Vajhala is an AI & Machine Learning Engineer specializing in deep learning models, low-latency audio assistants, graph-based cognitive memory loops, and agentic AI systems. He builds production-grade AI systems using PyTorch, LangChain, LlamaIndex, and vector databases.

## Contact & Profiles
- **Portfolio:** https://sainandu.is-a.dev/
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/SaiNanduVajhala
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/vajhala-sai-nandu
- **Kaggle:** https://kaggle.com/vajhalasainandu
- **Email:** vajhalasainandu@gmail.com
- **Location:** Hyderabad, India

## Technical Skills
- **Deep Learning:** PyTorch, TensorFlow, custom model architectures, CNNs, RNNs, Transformers, attention mechanisms, embeddings
- **LLMs & Agentic AI:** LangChain, LlamaIndex, vector databases, RAG pipelines, agent orchestration, prompt engineering
- **Cognitive Systems:** Graph-based memory architectures, knowledge graphs, cognee, context-retaining autonomous agents
- **Audio & Speech:** Low-latency voice activity detection (VAD), real-time audio streaming, conversational AI
- **Computer Vision:** Image classification, object detection, segmentation
- **Languages:** Python, TypeScript, SQL, C++
- **Tools:** Git, Linux, Docker, Vite, React

## Key Projects

### Oneiros — Cognitive Memory OS for AI Agents
A memory operating system built on graph database structures, LangChain, and custom vector embeddings that enables autonomous AI agents to retain, recall, and reason over long-term context across conversations and tasks.

### Low-Latency Audio Assistant
A real-time conversational AI voice assistant optimized for sub-250ms response latency. Features custom Voice Activity Detection (VAD), streaming audio pipelines, and efficient API routing for natural, fluid conversations.

## Education
- **B.Tech in Computer Science** — Specializing in AI & Machine Learning
- Active competitor on Kaggle in computer vision and NLP challenges

## What Sai Nandu Vajhala is known for
- Building production-grade cognitive memory systems for AI agents
- Optimizing real-time audio AI pipelines for ultra-low latency
- Deep expertise in PyTorch model design and training
- Graph-based knowledge representation for agentic AI
- Competitive machine learning on Kaggle
